de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma

Class AutomaticProver.Worker

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma.AutomaticProver.Worker
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Runnable
    Enclosing class:
    AutomaticProver

    private class AutomaticProver.Worker
extends Object
implements Runnable
    The core of the automatic prover runs in an own thread.
